a.xlink:title: Core enumerations and forward declarations for the Assumption System.
AssumptionContext class with scoped push/pop management.
InferenceEngine class for deriving properties of composite expressions.
PropertyStore class for mapping symbol names to declared properties.
QueryInterface class — unified tri-state query API for property questions on arbitrary expressions.
RelationStore class for storing relational constraints between symbolic expressions.
规范化访问器，合并同类项、化简数值运算、处理矩阵算术。
展开访问器，将乘积和幂展开为多项式形式。
极限访问器，通过代入和 L'Hôpital 法则计算极限。
Implementation of RelationStore for storing relational constraints.
